section_name: Timing of Inspection for Registration-based Enforcement
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 548. Inspection of Vehicles
##### § 548.257 — Timing of Inspection for Registration-based Enforcement

The department shall require a vehicle required to be inspected under this chapter to pass the required inspection:

    (1) for initial registration, not earlier than 90 days before the date of registration;

    (2) for a renewal of registration, not earlier than 90 days before the date of expiration of the vehicle’s registration;

    (3) if the vehicle is a used motor vehicle sold by a dealer, as defined by Section 503.001 (Definitions) , in the 180 days preceding the date the dealer sells the vehicle; or

    (4) if the vehicle is subject to the federal motor carrier safety regulations, in a period that complies with those regulations.

*Added by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 851 (H.B.3297), Sec. 17, eff. January 1, 2025.*

subsections.text: The department shall require a vehicle required to be inspected under this chapter to pass the required inspection:
for initial registration, not earlier than 90 days before the date of registration;
for a renewal of registration, not earlier than 90 days before the date of expiration of the vehicle’s registration;
if the vehicle is a used motor vehicle sold by a dealer, as defined by Section 503.001 (Definitions) , in the 180 days preceding the date the dealer sells the vehicle; or
if the vehicle is subject to the federal motor carrier safety regulations, in a period that complies with those regulations.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 851 (H.B.3297), Sec. 17, eff. January 1, 2025.
